name: SCC_StateTransitionInd
title: SCC_StateTransitionInd
syntax: void SCC_StateTransitionInd ( byte SessionID[], dword OldState, dword NewState )
description: The callback is called each time the internal state machine switches its state, i.e. usually when a new message is received. Use SCC_GetStateName for a string representation of the state IDs.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
